_comment: Rommel's Arrival reinforcement schedule (rule 20 / 61.2), a representative slice of the full Reinforcement Schedule ([4.43a/b], [4.45c] in the charts). arrival_turn maps the scenario Game-Turn to the engine turn (my_turn = GT - 25, so GT26=1 .. GT38=13; the engine caps at max_turns 12). Axis 15th Panzer enters around El Agheila (the west setup zone standing in for the Tripoli port) and road-marches east; each unit gets a DISTINCT entry hex so arrivals never over-stack. Commonwealth armour enters east of Tobruk to reinforce the garrison. hex is axial [q,r]; role is explicit. NOT the full ~40-unit roster -- the 15th Panzer armour + a CW armour slice, enough to exercise reinforcement arrival + the armour/anti-armor model. Full per-unit GT/OpStage list is in the reinforcement subagent report.
